source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

overview.summary: Book 2 provides typical Jonstown residents and social types for gamemaster use, including social assumptions and full example stat blocks.

sample_types.name: Typical Resident
sample_types.detail: Recent émigré, refugee, poor or unfree person without rights to vote or own property.

sample_types.name: Typical Citizen
sample_types.detail: Better-fed and better-off than a mere resident, meeting citizenship requirements described earlier.

sample_types.name: City Guard
sample_types.detail: Professional guardsman serving the City Rex and city laws.

sample_types.name: Militia Member
sample_types.detail: Citizen-soldier expected to defend the city when called.

sample_types.name: Free Sage
sample_types.detail: Lhankor Mhy-affiliated scribe or scholar available for hire.

sample_types.name: Merchant
sample_types.detail: Commercial actor in Jonstown's guild and temple economy.

sample_types.name: Thief
sample_types.detail: Typical criminal or Night Stalker-adjacent rogue.

sample_types.name: Lunar Resident
sample_types.detail: Typical remaining initiate of the Seven Mothers in Jonstown after liberation.

stats_note.summary: Each sample includes characteristic values, attacks, hit locations, attributes, Runes, cults or spirit magic, Passions, armor, skills, languages, and ransom values where relevant.
